Hero.text_7: — we transform your ideas into digital products that connect people, ideas, and opportunities.
Hero.alt_img: The Lumavok team collaborating in a tech studio

About.p_1: We take the time to understand your vision down to the
About.p_3: , then we transform it into a product that is
About.p_4: affordable, adaptable, and crafted with care

Services.subtitle: // What we build
Services.title: Our Services
Services.s1_insight: Websites, mobile apps, e-commerce, and custom management systems; built to last and scale.
Services.s2_insight: Chatbots, assistants, and automations that learn from your data to streamline your operations.
Services.s3_insight: User research, wireframes, and design systems for clear, accessible, and memorable interfaces.
Services.s4_insight: Academic portfolios, web resumes, and digital storefronts that tell your story and inspire trust.
Services.s5_insight: Technology choices, system modernization, and market insights to make informed decisions.
Services.s6_insight: Freemium and subscription platforms, secure and ready to grow with your market.

Stats.s1_blurb: Sites, apps, and systems deployed across the continent.
Stats.s2_blurb: From software development to AI, through design and SaaS.
Stats.s3_blurb: Local solutions, built to global standards.

Values.subtitle: // What guides us
Values.v1_text: We prototype, test, and relentlessly improve to push the boundaries of what technology can do.
Values.v2_text: We communicate clearly, keep our commitments, and work with complete transparency.
Values.v3_text: We test our products, refine our designs, and document every step of our work.
Values.v4_text: The best solutions are built together. We listen, co-create, and grow side by side.
Values.v5_text: We evolve with markets and technologies, open to change and feedback.
Values.v6_text: Our tools help our clients grow — in business, education, and community life.

Process.subtitle: // Our method
Process.s1_text: Every project begins with a discussion where we listen to your goals, challenges, and vision; before even discussing a budget.
Process.s2_text: We analyze your objectives in detail and prepare a tailored proposal: features, timelines, technologies, and a clear estimate.
Process.s3_text: We translate your vision into visual concepts, wireframes, and interactive prototypes, refined together before any development.
Process.s4_text: Once designs are approved, our developers bring them to life using modern standards, with documentation and regular check-ins.
Process.s5_text: Before launch, the system undergoes several cycles of functional and usability testing. You preview and approve every detail.
Process.s6_text: After your approval, we deploy the solution and train your team so they can confidently take the reins.

Pricing.subtitle: // Transparent pricing
Pricing.desc: Value first, clear deliverables, tiers adapted to your budget. The price only evolves with the project's complexity.

starter.name: Starter
starter.desc: For individuals, students, and micro-businesses launching their first online identity.

business.name: Business
business.desc: For SMEs that need a complete and professional online presence.

ecommerce.name: E-Commerce
ecommerce.desc: To sell physical or digital products with secure payments.

custom.name: Custom
custom.desc: Platforms tailored around unique workflows and advanced requirements.

Team.subtitle: // The team
Team.m1_bio: Leads the planning, execution, and delivery of every Lumavok project, on time and to quality standards.
Team.m2_bio: Defines the technological vision and ensures products are secure, scalable, and always ahead of trends.
Team.m3_bio: Designs and maintains reliable, secure, and performant databases for every product.
Team.m4_bio: Guides technical direction, ensures code quality and the architecture of our solutions.
Team.m5_bio: Creates and manages consistent, engaging content across all our online platforms.
Team.m6_bio: Imagines, shoots, and edits the videos that tell the story and projects of Lumavok.

Testimonials.q1_text: Lumavok turned our vision into a platform our customers love. Neat, fast, and affordable work.
Testimonials.q2_text: A young team but with rare professionalism. They delivered an AI system that now runs at the heart of our operations.
Testimonials.q3_text: From the first sketch to launch, every detail was thought out. Our product doubled its conversion rate.
Testimonials.q4_text: Global standards with a fine understanding of the local market. Exactly the partner we were looking for.

Contact.subtitle: // Let's start a project
Contact.desc: Tell us about your project. The first consultation is free, and we'll get back to you within 24 hours — wherever you are.

Footer.newsletter_desc: Get our thoughts on tech, design, and innovation in Africa — once a month, no noise.
Footer.bio: Youth-led African tech studio. Websites, apps, AI systems, and digital products; affordable, adaptable, and carefully crafted.
Footer.slogan: Local solutions, built to global standards.
